title: citrus undulata
intro: Citrus undulata, also known as the 'Mountain Lemon', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the mountainous regions of southern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Citrus undulata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a valued herbal remedy. Citrus undulata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or juice, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to create various herbal preparations, such as tonics and salves.
